Thanks for the contribution! A few things to keep the review tight:

- Link the issue this addresses (if any) with "Fixes #N" or "Refs #N".
- Keep the PR focused: one concern per PR is easier to review.
- Run `npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` locally before pushing.
-->
